title: ML-Based Anomaly Detection with Concept Drift
summary: A streaming machine learning research project focused on detecting anomalies when behaviour changes over time.

content.overview: This MSc research direction explores how anomaly detection systems can stay accurate when incoming data patterns shift over time. Traditional static models often lose performance when real-world behaviour changes, so this project studies concept drift-aware detection and evaluation.
content.problem: Static anomaly detectors can become unreliable when the underlying data distribution changes. In security, finance, infrastructure and IoT systems, this can lead to missed threats or excessive false alarms.
content.solution: The project uses streaming data preparation, model training, drift monitoring and comparative evaluation to identify when models need adaptation.
features: Evaluation using precision, recall and false alarm behaviour
content.outcome: A strong MSc project foundation suitable for research, implementation, evaluation and dissertation writing.
content.future: Add dashboard visualisation, live stream simulation, adaptive model retraining and explainable anomaly reports.

title: The Miner’s Spice Restaurant Platform
summary: A restaurant website and management system with menu, ordering, admin and customer-facing pages.

content.overview: A commercial restaurant platform designed to support online menu browsing, customer ordering, bookings, gallery pages and backend management.
content.problem: Small restaurants often rely on generic templates that do not manage menu structure, orders and presentation professionally.
content.solution: The platform connects customer-facing pages with backend/admin logic so the restaurant can manage content and orders in one system.
content.outcome: A practical business system that can be customised and sold to restaurants.
content.future: Add payment gateway, kitchen dashboard, order tracking and analytics.

title: SmartCV AI CV Analyzer
summary: An AI-supported CV optimisation workspace with ATS feedback, role-fit analysis and subscription logic.
tools: AI workflows, Web stack, Stripe, Resume parsing

content.overview: SmartCV AI is a CV optimisation concept/platform focused on helping candidates improve their CVs through ATS scoring, keyword alignment and improvement suggestions.
content.problem: Many job seekers submit CVs that are not aligned with job descriptions or ATS keyword patterns.
content.solution: The system analyses CV content, compares it with role requirements and provides structured suggestions for improvement.
content.outcome: A strong AI SaaS-style project for job-tech and career support.
content.future: Add job-description matching, rewrite suggestions, dashboard history and recruiter view.

title: Q-Learning Grid World Agent
summary: A reinforcement learning coursework project using Q-learning in a 5×5 grid with obstacles and sparse rewards.

content.overview: This project demonstrates reinforcement learning through a grid-world environment where an agent learns to navigate from start to goal using Q-table updates.
content.problem: The agent must learn optimal navigation despite obstacles, sparse rewards and exploration trade-offs.
content.solution: Q-learning with epsilon-greedy exploration is used to compare learning behaviour across different exploration values.
content.outcome: A clear academic AI project showing practical reinforcement learning understanding.
content.future: Add visual simulation, animated training steps and comparison charts.

title: Coursera Digital Transformation Strategy
summary: A digital transformation strategy analysis for Coursera covering AI, data analytics, cloud and EdTech maturity.

content.overview: This project analyses Coursera as a digital education platform and explores its maturity, platform strategy and use of digital technologies.
content.problem: EdTech platforms must adapt to learner expectations, AI personalisation and scalable infrastructure.
content.solution: The strategy reviews AI, big data, learner analytics, cloud systems and recommendation concepts.
content.outcome: A professional academic strategy project suitable for demonstrating business and technical analysis.
content.future: Add interactive strategy dashboard and competitor benchmarking.

title: Cloud-Native Air Pollution & Respiratory Death Analysis
summary: A cloud data project analysing average PM2.5 pollution and respiratory deaths using Azure and PySpark.
tools: Azure Data Lake Gen2, Synapse Spark, PySpark, Plotly

content.overview: This project studies the relationship between PM2.5 pollution and respiratory deaths using cloud-native data engineering and analytics workflows.
content.problem: Environmental and health datasets need scalable processing before meaningful insights can be extracted.
content.solution: Raw CSV data is ingested, transformed with Spark, stored as Parquet and analysed through country-level aggregation and visualisation.
content.outcome: A strong big data portfolio project connecting cloud infrastructure with real-world health analytics.
content.future: Add automated ETL pipeline, Power BI dashboard and predictive modelling.

title: PenTest-Ont Cybersecurity Ontology
summary: A cybersecurity ontology modelling tools, techniques, vulnerabilities and penetration testing knowledge.

content.overview: PenTest-Ont structures penetration testing knowledge using ontology engineering and semantic technologies.
content.problem: Cybersecurity knowledge can become fragmented across tools, techniques and vulnerability categories.
content.solution: The ontology models relationships between tools, testing techniques, vulnerabilities and reasoning concepts.
content.outcome: A unique cybersecurity research project showing structured knowledge modelling.
content.future: Connect ontology to automated security reports and AI assistants.

title: AutoMarketPro Car Marketplace
summary: A car-selling marketplace with seller ads, subscriptions, Stripe checkout, image uploads and admin moderation.

content.overview: AutoMarketPro is a car marketplace platform inspired by vehicle listing systems, allowing sellers to post ads and manage subscription-based listings.
content.problem: Car-selling platforms need listing control, payment workflows, admin moderation and clean search/filtering.
content.solution: The system connects seller ad posting with subscription packages, Stripe checkout and admin review tools.
content.outcome: A monetisable web system with strong commercial potential.
content.future: Add advanced search, valuations, dealer profiles, finance calculator and analytics.

title: Unity FPS Sniper Contracts Prototype
summary: A tactical FPS sniper prototype with AI states, missions, vehicles, weapons, ADS and large terrain design.
tools: Unity, C#, Blender, AI Systems, Vehicle Controller

content.overview: A sniper contracts-style tactical FPS prototype built in Unity with mission structure, AI behaviour, terrain, vehicles and scoped weapon systems.
content.problem: Tactical shooter prototypes require multiple systems to work together: AI, movement, weapons, mission logic and level design.
content.solution: The project builds modular systems for missions, weapons, vehicles and enemy AI states.
content.outcome: A serious game development prototype that demonstrates systems thinking and Unity engineering.
content.future: Add polished AI, UI, audio, cinematic intro and Steam-ready vertical slice.

title: Cybersecurity DVWA & Ethical Hacking Labs
summary: Hands-on cybersecurity labs using DVWA, Burp Suite, OWASP concepts and professional reporting practice.
tools: DVWA, Burp Suite, OWASP testing workflow

content.overview: This lab project demonstrates practical ethical hacking awareness through controlled vulnerable environments and reporting practice.
content.problem: Security concepts are easier to understand when tested in legal, controlled lab environments.
content.solution: DVWA-style workflows are used to practise vulnerability testing, evidence capture and mitigation thinking.
content.outcome: A practical cybersecurity learning portfolio section.
content.future: Add full write-ups, remediation steps and lab videos.

title: Jarvis AI Agent Workflow
summary: A modular AI assistant workflow concept using n8n-style automation, local models and API actions.

content.overview: Jarvis is a personal assistant concept built around modular AI workflows, automation and action-based tasks.
content.problem: Many daily workflows are repetitive but require context, decision-making and structured tool use.
content.solution: The concept uses agents, prompts, local models and API-style actions to automate productivity tasks.
content.outcome: A strong AI automation concept for future development.
content.future: Build working agent modules for email, calendar, files, research and project management.

title: Full-Stack Dating App Prototype
summary: A full-stack app prototype with authentication direction, profile flow, matching concept and database schema planning.

content.overview: A product-style dating app prototype exploring full-stack structure, user profiles, authentication and matching workflows.
content.problem: Modern dating apps require secure authentication, clean data modelling and smooth profile/matching flows.
content.solution: The prototype plans frontend, backend, Prisma schema and PostgreSQL database structure.
content.outcome: A useful full-stack learning and product design project.
content.future: Add working auth, chat, profile verification and recommendations.

title: Blender Animation & VFX Portfolio
summary: A creative portfolio area for 2D/3D animation, Blender assets, VFX, video editing and modular game/promo visuals.
tools: Blender, After Effects, Premiere Pro, Unity assets

content.overview: This creative portfolio section presents Haider’s experience across 2D/3D animation, VFX, video editing and game-ready visual production.
content.problem: Creative technical work needs a polished showcase that connects visual skill with practical production outcomes.
content.solution: The project groups animation, modular assets, VFX and editing work into a professional portfolio format.
content.outcome: A creative-technical showcase supporting freelance, game and media opportunities.
content.future: Add showreel video, before/after VFX breakdowns and asset galleries.

title: Family Haven Shopify Store
summary: A UK-focused Shopify pet supplies store with product research, CJ Dropshipping, SEO blogs and paid ad testing.
tools: Shopify, CJ Dropshipping, Meta Ads, Pinterest, SEO blogs

content.overview: Family Haven is a pet supplies e-commerce store focused on UK customers, product testing and digital marketing.
content.problem: New stores need niche selection, product research, conversion-focused pages and traffic testing.
content.solution: The store uses Shopify, CJ Dropshipping, UK-focused delivery messaging, blogs and paid ad experiments.
content.outcome: A practical e-commerce business project showing product, marketing and store-building skills.
content.future: Add winning product funnel, email automation, reviews and conversion optimisation.
